eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 08:53 PM ON FEB 15, 2026 Effective until 04:53 AM FEB 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Mesa Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Mesa Police Department is looking for a Hispanic male, Marcos Castillo-Luna, 67 years-old, 5 foot 2 inches, 140 pounds, with gray hair and brown eyes. Marcos was last seen wearing a red long sleeve shirt with blue jeans. Marcos was last seen on foot in the area of Mesa Drive & McKellips Road in Mesa, Arizona, Maricopa County on 02/15/2026 at approximately 10:00 A.M. Marcos is non-verbal and has a medical condition that requires him to take medication. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
